description: Using the Landsat GeoTIFF at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (band_2: NIR, band_3: Red), simulate the quantization of a 32-bit NDVI product into an 8-bit integer format and analyze the resulting error. Generate the following bands: 'NDVI_float' (float32) using the formula (band_2 - band_3) / (band_2 + band_3); 'NDVI_uint8' (uint8) using (NDVI_float + 1.0) * 127.5; 'NDVI_recon' (float32) using (NDVI_uint8 / 127.5) - 1.0; and 'Quantization_Error' (float32) using abs(NDVI_float - NDVI_recon). Save the complete product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/quantization_study.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/quantization_error.tif.
